summary: Security Hardening phase tested successfully. All 2FA/TOTP authentication features working correctly. Backend: 100% (9/9 tests pass). Frontend: Security Settings page and 2FA login flow working correctly. Security headers and rate limiting are in place.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: LoginResponse model correctly returns requires_2fa and temp_token fields
Good: 2FA enable flow returns secret, QR code (base64 PNG), and 10 backup codes
Good: TOTP verification uses valid_window=1 for time drift tolerance
Good: Backup codes are single-use and removed after use
Good: 2FA disable requires both password and valid TOTP code
Good: Security headers middleware adds X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, CSP, HSTS, etc.
Good: Rate limiting on auth endpoints (10/minute for login, 5/minute for signup)
Good: Database indexes created on startup for users.email, users.role, and various collections
Good: Frontend 2FA login form has 6-digit code inputs with auto-advance and auto-submit
Good: Security Settings page at /settings/security shows 2FA status and enable/disable buttons

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Login page, Dashboard Security button, Security Settings page, 2FA setup UI, 2FA login form all working)

demo_user.2fa_status: disabled (was enabled during testing, then disabled)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Security Settings page is at /settings/security (protected route). 2) 2FA flow: enable -> get secret -> verify-setup with TOTP -> enabled. 3) Login with 2FA: login returns requires_2fa=true + temp_token -> POST /api/auth/login/2fa with temp_token + code. 4) Rate limiting is active - may need to wait 60s between rapid auth tests. 5) pyotp library is used for TOTP generation/verification. 6) All security headers are present on API responses.

backend_2fa_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login: WORKING - Returns LoginResponse with requires_2fa and temp_token for 2FA users
backend_2fa_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login/2fa: WORKING - Accepts temp_token + code, returns access_token
backend_2fa_endpoints.POST /api/auth/2fa/verify-setup: WORKING - Activates 2FA after valid TOTP verification
backend_2fa_endpoints.POST /api/auth/2fa/disable: WORKING - Requires password + valid TOTP code
backend_2fa_endpoints.GET /api/health: WORKING - Returns status with MongoDB, Hedera, Stripe, Daily, Resend checks

security_headers.Content-Security-Policy: Present with default-src 'self' and other directives

frontend_pages.login_page: WORKING - Email/password fields, Sign In button, 2FA form when required
frontend_pages.dashboard: WORKING - Security button in header links to /settings/security
frontend_pages.security_settings: WORKING - Shows 2FA status, Enable/Disable buttons, QR code, backup codes

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/auth/login (demo, with 2FA) - 200 OK, returns requires_2fa=true + temp_token
POST /api/auth/login/2fa - 200 OK, returns access_token after valid TOTP
POST /api/auth/2fa/enable - 200 OK, returns secret + qr_code + backup_codes
